## Entities.Fillings.IFillingIngredientEntity.modifiers property

Optional modifiers that qualify how the ingredient is measured or added. Includes spoonLevel, toTaste, and future measurement qualifiers.

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly modifiers?: IIngredientModifiers;
```
